video_title: Mass Production Process of Candle. A day in a Candle Factory.

windows.old_description: Molten wax channels in the candle factory.
windows.embed_text_v2: factory worker demoulding large white pillar candles from industrial metal mould plate, threaded wicks, water cooling, mass production candle moulding
windows.summary_v2: In a candle factory, a gloved worker demoulds large white pillar candles from a water-cooled industrial mould plate with threaded wicks.

seconds_v2.desc: Gloved factory worker pulls a large white cylindrical pillar candle from an industrial metal moulding table; rows of finished white pillars lie alongside with wicks threaded through the mould plate.
Worker draws another demoulded white pillar candle free; wet wax and water coat the mould plate, wicks rising from each cavity.
Gloved hand lifts a white pillar candle out of its mould channel; many wicks stand in the flooded mould plate to the right.
Top-down view into the mould plate cavities filled with water, central wicks threaded, dark wax visible at the openings.
Water floods around the mould cavities, a metal hose feeding water, wicks taut through each hole.
Continued view of water-cooled mould cavities with threaded wicks and dark molten wax pooling.
Close-up of the mould plate: rows of round cavities with wicks, white candles cooling at left, water running over.
A metal hose runs across the wet mould plate, wicks threaded through the cavities, white pillars at the edge.

a machine that is making cups

windows.embed_text: a machine that is making ice | a worker working on a machine in a factory | a factory worker working on a machine | a machine that is making rolls of rolls | a machine that is making cups | a machine that is making white candles | a machine that is making a lot of coins
windows.old_description: Wax fed into the moulding machine.
windows.embed_text_v2: factory mass production of tall white pillar candles in metal mould rack with threaded wicks running through cavities, worker in gloves trimming wicks, industrial candle making line
windows.summary_v2: Factory mass-production line of large white pillar candles in metal mould racks with threaded wicks, worker tending the bed.

seconds_v2.desc: Industrial pillar-candle mould rack: large white finished cylindrical candles being lifted out while another row of black cylindrical mould cavities sits in the bed; a metal flexible hose lies across. 'Factory Monster' watermark bottom right.
Worker's gloved hand at top left holding a tool; rows of finished tall white pillar candles strung between threaded wicks sit on the mould tray.
Same factory setup; rows of large white pillar candles aligned with vertical wick threads. Worker's hand trimming/cutting wicks at top left.
Camera angle changes to show two tiered shelves of white pillar candles with wicks running upward and the open mould cavities filled with shiny black wax holding sections in place.
Similar wider angle on the mould bed; cylindrical white candles arranged in straight rows above the black cavity holes; wicks taut between them.
Another mould-rack view of the tall white candles with thread wicks running through the metal frame.
Same factory rack tightened in; rows of white pillar candles still ready, wicks centered.
Close-up on a single black mould cavity with a thin wick suspended down through the hole and the silver flexible hose coiled at left, mid-production.

a line of white plastic sheets in a factory
a convey convey with white plastic sheets
a convey convey with a convey belt and convey belt
a machine that is making yellow candles
a convey conveying machine with yellow plastic tubes
a convey with yellow waxs on it
a machine that is making yellow candles

windows.embed_text: a factory with many white plastic sheets | a line of white plastic sheets in a factory | a convey convey with white plastic sheets | a convey convey with a convey belt and convey belt | a machine that is making yellow candles | a convey conveying machine with yellow plastic tubes | a convey with yellow waxs on it
windows.old_description: Rows of candles cooling in the moulds on the conveyor.
windows.embed_text_v2: rows of white and yellow cylindrical pillar candles setting in industrial mould rack, central wicks, mass production candle factory cooling curing
windows.summary_v2: Candle factory rows of white and then yellow cylindrical pillar candles setting in industrial mould racks with central wicks.

seconds_v2.desc: Rows of large white cylindrical pillar candles set in an industrial mould rack, each with a central wick, viewed down the table.
Same rack of white pillar candles cooling in their mould channels, wicks suspended above each cavity.
Angled view along the mould table, dozens of white pillars seated in the cavities with wires holding the wicks.
White pillar candles continue setting in the long mould rack, wicks threaded down the rows.
Cut to rows of bright yellow pillar candles set in the industrial mould plate, wicks protruding, wax pooled around the bases.
Yellow pillar candles seated in their round mould cavities, glossy wax surfaces, central wicks.
More rows of yellow pillar candles in the mould rack, wax still glossy as it sets around the wicks.
Close view of yellow pillar candles cooling in the mould cavities, wicks standing up from each.

windows.old_description: Rows of candles cooling in the moulds on the conveyor.
windows.embed_text_v2: molten yellow wax filling long industrial mould bed around metal core pins, worker setting wicks, mass production candle factory pouring moulding
windows.summary_v2: Candle factory yellow wax fills a long industrial mould bed around metal core pins while a worker sets the wicks.

tags_v2.action: filling moulds with wax, setting wicks

seconds_v2.desc: Molten yellow wax pooled across an industrial mould plate with upright metal core pins in each cavity; finished pink candles lie at the right edge.
Close-up of yellow wax filling the round mould cavities around the metal core pins, wax oozing over the plate.
Wide view of a long mould table filled with yellow wax; a gloved worker threads wicks along the far rail, drying racks behind.
Worker continues setting wicks down the long yellow-wax mould rail, metal core pins standing in every cavity.
Long industrial mould bed full of yellow wax with rows of metal core pins, hanging wick wires above.
Angled view down the mould table, yellow wax set around the upright pins, wick wires strung overhead.
Close-up of yellow wax pooled in the round cavities around the metal core pins as it sets.
Tight shot of the yellow-wax mould cavities and core pins, glossy wax filling each round opening.

windows.old_description: Machine finishing the candles (stamping Korean text, cutting, rolling).
windows.embed_text_v2: industrial shrink wrap and label machine packaging finished white pillar candles with printed Korean product labels and safety info on conveyor in candle factory
windows.summary_v2: Industrial machine shrink-wrapping and labeling finished white pillar candles with printed product labels at a factory.

tags_v2.on_screen_text: Factory Monster watermark; Korean text on product label

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of an industrial wrapping machine feeding a white pillar candle through rollers with a printed paper label being applied; 'Factory Monster' watermark bottom right.
Inside the machine: the wrapped white candle is being conveyed past a clamp; printed plastic film with text wraps around the pillar.
Camera angle changes; the labeled pillar candle moves along the conveyor with its printed wrapper visible.
Another close-up of the wrapped candle progressing through the wrapping/labeling machine; product information panel visible on the film.
Conveyor mechanism with rollers and metal frame visible; a wrapped candle bottom edge passes through the machine.
Macro close-up of the printed wrapper showing Korean product label text including ingredient and safety info on the white pillar candle.
Wrapped pillar candle exits the machine, its label fully attached and clearly visible.
Final close-up of the finished labeled and shrink-wrapped pillar candle held in the machine; metal mechanism visible.
